parents.subject: LU-19757 mgs: do not start transaction if session is stale

commit.subject: LU-19758 ptlrpc: do not leak path
commit.message:
LU-19758 ptlrpc: do not leak path

kobject_get_path() must free allocated path

Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I509891d5a481efc47309e566fc6dbd71bacd25a0
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63370
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
